title: Assessment of the 9th Korean Workers' Party Congress Economic Strategy
description: Comparative analysis of economic directives from the 7th, 8th, and 9th Party Congresses, focusing on the shift from aggressive growth targets to stability-oriented “qualitative development” under conditions of domestic fiscal constraint and external geopolitical uncertainty.

title: Health and Economic Assimilation of North Korean Defectors
description: Joint work with Jongmin Lee and HyeSeung Wee examining how physical and mental health status shape labor-market and economic outcomes for North Korean defectors after resettlement in South Korea.

title: Economic Implications of North Korea–Russia Cooperation
description: Extension of recent work (Korean Journal of Defense Analysis, 2024) on the economic dimensions of strengthened North Korea–Russia ties amid the Russia–Ukraine war, including trade flows, labor exports, and the broader sanctions-evasion landscape.
